chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI CP D 616 of 2022 ____________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE ____________________________________________________________ 1. For hearing of CMA No.2836/2022 2. For hearing of main case 14.04.2025 Messrs. Fayaz Ali Metlo, Athar Hussain, Farooq Ali Mirani, Atiya Manzoor and Adeela Ansari, advocates for the petitioner Mr. Nadeem Ahmed advocate holds brief for Mr. Salahuddin Ahmed, advocate for respondent No.1 Mr. Aqeel Ahmed Khan, advocate for respondent No.2. Ms. Mehreen Ibrahim, Deputy Attorney General Kazim Raza, Registrar, Customs Appellate Tribunal Bench-I, Karachi Statement filed on behalf of respondent No.1 is taken on record. Statement demonstrates that the impugned notice stands withdrawn. In view hereof learned counsel for the petitioner states that the petition appears to have served its purpose, hence, may be disposed of. Order accordingly. Judge Judge Amjad
